english_sentence: The neural network uses backpropagation to update its weights during training.
Gradient descent optimizes the loss function by adjusting the learning rate.
Overfitting occurs when the model memorizes training data instead of generalizing.
The transformer model uses an attention mechanism to process input sequences.
We need to tune the hyperparameters like batch size and number of epochs.
Dropout is a regularization technique that prevents overfitting in deep learning.
The convolutional neural network extracts features from image data automatically.
Transfer learning allows us to fine-tune a pretrained model on a new dataset.
The encoder compresses the input and the decoder reconstructs the output sequence.
Tokenization splits the input text into subword units before embedding.
The BLEU score measures how well the machine translation matches the reference.
Named entity recognition identifies people organizations and locations in text.
Sentiment analysis classifies text as positive negative or neutral.
The corpus used for training contains millions of domain-specific sentences.
Principal component analysis reduces the dimensionality of high-dimensional data.
Support vector machines find the optimal hyperplane for classification tasks.
Random forest combines multiple decision trees to improve prediction accuracy.
Clustering algorithms group similar data points based on distance metrics.
The softmax function converts raw logits into probability distributions.
ReLU activation function introduces non-linearity into the neural network.
Semantic similarity measures how close two sentences are in meaning.
The recurrent neural network processes sequential data with hidden states.
Generative adversarial networks consist of a generator and a discriminator.
Part of speech tagging assigns grammatical labels to each word in a sentence.
The sigmoid activation function squashes values between zero and one.
